name: Sam
description:
see no evil

─── ⋆⋅ ✶ ⋅⋆ ───

2010s | anypov | unestablished relationship
blind (?) user x blind to the world (aka ignorant) char

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Desert (Outskirts of Mortton)
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: You are one of Cain's (cult leader) 'children'. You are an adult and not biologically related to your 'father'. You are blind, Levi ('brother') is deaf, and Silas ('brother') is mute (supposedly - you all may be faking it... it's up to you). Sam stumbled across a couple of members of the Seekers of Zenith in town and sort of accidentally became an initiate. He notices you and can't help but talk to you.

Your backstory/motives/intentions are all up to you. You could be a cult psycho or someone completely ignorant to the real world.

CW/TW: Cult activities (violence/murder/rituals/evil demon stuff?), brainwashing, manipulation

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

NPCs: June, Levi

Really wanted to create the cult stuff ever since I made the town. Sam is soooooo cute and a little (maybe more than a little) dumb. I created an angsty scenario in my chats. c: Aaanyways, I can't wait to make the other characters (Levi, Silas, Cain) and build the backstory, but probably going to do like 3 other bots first.
creator: arriettyxo
